title: Vežba 99

questions.text:
Nakon što je razgovarala sa Tomom, Alice je poslala svojoj majci SMS poruku:

Hey Mom, I've decided to switch jobs! I want to find a company with the best work-life balance and good career growth opportunities. I talked to my friend Tom, and he gave me a lot to think about. He told me about a few companies. One has the most structured training programs, another offers the highest salaries, and one has the most laid-back culture. That's interesting because I never thought so much about these differences before.

I think I'd really enjoy working in a place with a creative and relaxed environment. I also want a job that lets me grow but still gives me time for myself. Good to know there are companies that offer both!

Mom, I really appreciate that you always support me. I'll keep you updated! 😊💕

Kakve informacije je Tom dao Alici?

answers.answer: Rekao mu da ostane na svom poslu gde je sada.
answers.feedback: Tom je dao Alici informacije o novom poslu, a ne savet da ostane gde je.
Tom mu je dao savet, ali nije rekao da ga je pomogao da se prijavi bilo gde.

answers.answer: Rekao je da su sve kompanije jednake.
answers.feedback: Tom je pokazao značajne razlike između kompanija, ne da rekemo da su iste.

instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje je navedeno/nalazi se ispod.
explanation:
Tom je pomogao Alice objašnjavanjem kako različite kompanije nude različite benefite. Spomenuo je da jedna kompanija ima the most structured training, druga ima the highest salaries, i treća ima the most laid-back culture.

Ovo pokazuje da ju je pomogao da uporedi opcije, umesto da preporučuje da su sve kompanije iste ili da joj savetuje da ostane na poslu gde sada radi.
